feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: The Uplift: The American Dream
entry.content: We celebrate the United States ahead of its 250th anniversary with stories about American heroes and pastimes. The founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics shares how he made a massive life change to become a Catholic priest.

entry.title: Trump’s Man in Canada Practices a No-Holds-Barred Diplomacy
entry.content: Ambassador Pete Hoekstra is the president’s unabashed defender in a country where tariffs and talk of a 51st state are wildly unpopular.

entry.title: How French Police Skirted European Privacy Laws to Hunt a Serial Rapist
entry.content: France and other nations debate allowing police to comb commercial DNA sites to hunt elusive criminals, worrying privacy-rights groups.

entry.title: 'You're scaring my people.' Shia LaBeouf's alleged stalker arrested after posting viral video
entry.content: Hours after posting a video of Shia LaBeouf telling her 'you're scaring my people,' a woman who runs an Instagram account with more than 5,000 posts about the actor was arrested.

entry.title: Paramount prevails in bid for new judge in federal antitrust case
entry.content: Judge Araceli Martínez-Olguín will now oversee the high-profile antitrust case challenging Paramount's proposed takeover of Warner Bros.

entry.title: 'Batman 2' is delayed again. Here's everything we know so far about Matt Reeves' sequel
entry.content: Warner Bros. has pushed back the release of 'The Batman Part II' once again. Here is everything to know about Matt Reeves' sequel to his 2022 reboot.

entry.title: Argentina beats England to reach finals
entry.content: Argentina will now face Spain in the World Cup final after coming from behind to win today’s match. The reigning champs are now fighting for a chance to win back to back titles. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch has the story.

entry.title: Controlling Hormuz Would Take More U.S. Troops—and Even More Risk
entry.content: As U.S. strikes on Iran continue, military experts say opening the strait would require months of effort.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
The one you love is closer than you think.
Lucky Numbers: 82, 94, 95, 77, 98, 7

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: If you wanna get good at something – Do it 100 Times over 100 days.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: The plastic things on the end of shoelaces are called aglets.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Lao Tzu
entry.content: “Knowing others is wisdom, knowing yourself is enlightenment.” — Lao Tzu

entry.title: Zelensky Ousts Popular Defense Minister as Ukraine Gains Momentum in the War
entry.content: The dismissal provoked criticism among Ukrainians who credit Mykhailo Fedorov for his efforts to modernize the country’s armed forces.

entry.title: New audio from Nolan Wells case
entry.content: NBC News has obtained audio as a part of a records request that details some of Nolan Wells’ friends calling for towing assistance when their boat malfunctioned. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist reports from Mississippi on the latest in the college football player’s death investigation.

entry.title: Vance Ramps Up Criticism of Israel
entry.content: In an interview with the podcaster Joe Rogan, the vice president said some in Israel want the war with Iran to continue “indefinitely.”

entry.title: Watch Jude Bellingham slap Argentina player in the head after blowing World Cup semifinal
entry.content: Here's a look at England's star, who appeared to hit 21-year-old Valentin Barco after the loss.

entry.title: Black doctors in England four times less likely to get training places than white counterparts
entry.content: For one placement, black applicants had a less than 1 in 100 chance of being offered a place, NHS data showsBlack doctors in England are four times less likely to be offered a training place than their white counterparts, according to analysis.As part of their medical training, doctors across the NHS are able to apply to placements within specific branches of practice such as psychiatry, obstetrics and gynaecology, and emergency medicine. Continue reading...

entry.title: England vs. Argentina player ratings: Live grades for Lionel Messi, Thomas Tuchel, others in 2026 World Cup semifinal
entry.content: Lionel Messi and Argentina were five minutes from exiting the 2026 FIFA World Cup, but Thomas Tuchel and England threw away a spot in the World Cup final as they fell to the defending champions.

entry.title: Worst England World Cup heartbreaks: Where devastating Argentina loss ranks among most disappointing results
entry.content: England has suffered its fair share of devastating losses during the World Cup. Wednesdeay's loss ot Argenitna might be the most tragic of those results.

entry.title: Fetterman warns he would leave Democratic Party if it turns its back on Israel
entry.content: Fetterman warns he would leave Democratic Party if it turns its back on Israel

entry.title: How cowardly Thomas Tuchel threw away England's World Cup in semifinal collapse to Argentina
entry.content: It seemed that England had one foot in the World Cup final. They did, until suddenly they didn't, and Thomas Tuchel has only himself to blame.

entry.title: 2026 World Matchplay of Darts prize money: Details on increased amounts for winner and others
entry.content: Players will be able to earn more this year than they did in Blackpool in 2025.

entry.title: Will England fire Thomas Tuchel after blowing World Cup semifinal vs. Argentina?
entry.content: Here's a look at whether or not England will sack Tuchel ahead of the painful loss.

entry.title: Pacers' Tyrese Haliburton trolls NBA world with ex-Lakers star LeBron James free agency stunt
entry.content: The Indiana Pacers have become a potential place for LeBron James over the last couple of days. Tyrese Haliburton decided to have a little fun with it on Wednesday.

entry.title: Who is still in the World Cup? Updated list of teams left in 2026 FIFA semifinal bracket
entry.content: Here's a look at the four sides left in this year's competiton.

entry.title: Reducing ultra-processed foods could prevent thousands of heart disease deaths, study suggests
entry.content: Researchers in Canada say that UFPs could be ‘substantial and potentially preventable’ contributor to the diseaseThousands of people could avoid dying of heart disease by reducing ultra-processed foods (UPFs), experts have said, as a modelling study suggests junk food may be driving up to a third of cases.Millions of people increasingly consume UPFs such as ready meals, breakfast cereals, protein bars, fizzy drinks and fast food. Continue reading...

entry.title: Sophie Cunningham shows off abs in stylish pregame outfit before Fever game
entry.content: Another ab showing look on Wednesday.

entry.title: Jets omission is a red flag for Aaron Glenn and New York
entry.content: Aaron Glenn and the New York Jets may have some trouble brewing.

entry.title: Elon Musk bought a gas turbine company
entry.content: It's likely to become a direct power source for SpaceXAI's data centers.

entry.title: CDC nominee Erica Schwartz pressed on whether she will resist RFK Jr’s vaccine agenda
entry.content: During confirmation hearing Wednesday, Trump’s pick tells Senate health committee she would ‘never betray the science’Erica Schwartz, the Trump administration’s latest nominee to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), faced sharp questioning from senators who pressed her to say whether she would stand up to her boss, the health secretary Robert F Kennedy Jr.During her confirmation hearing on Wednesday, Schwartz, a deputy surgeon general in the first Trump administration, told the Senate health committee she “will never betray the science” and pledged to use “radical transparency” to rebuild public trust. But she repeatedly deflected questions about how she would handle pressure from Kennedy, a leader in the anti-vaccine movement who has overseen months of turmoil at the agency and made controversial changes to US vaccine policies. Continue reading...

entry.title: Many Democrats Break With Israel, Back Measure Stripping Military Aid
entry.content: The amendment fails to pass House, but shows how support for Israel has eroded in Congress.

entry.title: Ex-captain pleads guilty to drugging and raping a U.S. Merchant Marine Academy cadet on a cargo ship
entry.content: A former cargo ship captain pleaded guilty on Wednesday to drugging and raping a 21-year-old U.S. Merchant Marine Academy cadet who was working on the vessel as part of the academy's Sea Year training program.

entry.title: Drained Reflecting Pool reveals Trump's 'American flag blue' liner is now closer to gray
entry.content: Drained Reflecting Pool reveals Trump's 'American flag blue' liner is now closer to gray

entry.title: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms
entry.content: The safety board confirmed Tesla's account of the crash, which the company shared days after it happened last month.

entry.title: Matt Freese opens up on ‘difficult’ response to USMNT’s World Cup exit and ‘hunger’ to return
entry.content: U.S. Men's National Team goalkeeper Matt Freese has opened up on their tough FIFA World Cup exit, the subsequent response, and his desire to return to fight another day

entry.title: England v Argentina sets unwanted World Cup record after ‘physical’ first half
entry.content: There was not a single shot on target after a bruising 45 minutes in Atlanta

entry.title: Arizona Cardinals training camp roster preview: S Joey Blount
entry.content: We will preview every player on the Cardinals roster leading up to training camp. This is about S. Joey Blount.

entry.title: The buzz at SWAC Football Media Day was swarming around Alabama State football
entry.content: It felt like the tide was changing at SWAC Football Media Day with Alabama State football stealing the spotlight.

entry.title: Shakur Stevenson says he's 'verbally agreed' to fight Devin Haney in Zuffa Boxing debut: 'They want Devin'
entry.content: Zuffa Boxing is wasting no time in trying to make the biggest matchups for its marquee fighter.

entry.title: UFC Belgrade poster drops for ‘Medic vs. Rodriguez’ on Aug. 1 in Serbia
entry.content: Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) recently announced the upcoming UFC Belgrade mixed martial arts (MMA) event for Sat., Aug. 1, 2026 at Belgrade Arena in Serbia. The Paramount+ fight card (see it here) will be headlined by the welterweight showdown pitting Uros Medic against Daniel Rodriguez (more on that here). Now they have an official poster. […]

entry.title: Still playing nearly 30 years after his Open debut is testament to Justin Rose's talent, longevity
entry.content: It’s been 28 years since Justin Rose chipped in on the 72nd hole as an amateur in the 1998 Open at Royal Birkdale.

entry.title: Former Fed Adviser Gets 38 Months in Prison for Lying to Internal Watchdog
entry.content: A jury found John Rogers guilty earlier this year of making a false statement but acquitted him of a more serious charge of conspiracy to commit economic espionage for China

entry.title: Daniel Ek’s body-scanning startup Neko Health raises another $700M
entry.content: Neko Health has developed proprietary body-scanning technology, which it couples with bloodwork, to assess a person's health.

entry.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
entry.content: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

entry.title: Trump Leans Toward Expanding U.S. Military Operations in Iran
entry.content: While preferring diplomacy, the president was briefed this week on options, including the use of ground troops and bombing the nuclear-linked site Pickaxe Mountain.

entry.title: Exclusive-US strikes on Iran strengthen Trump's options for new escalation, officials say
entry.content: Exclusive-US strikes on Iran strengthen Trump's options for new escalation, officials say

entry.title: YouTube joins Meta in appealing jury verdict over users' social media addiction
entry.content: YouTube has appealed a landmark social media addiction lawsuit verdict in Los Angeles

entry.title: SpaceX Shares Fall Below IPO Price for the First Time
entry.content: The rocket maker’s stock slipped below $135 as the tech-heavy Nasdaq composite dropped.

entry.title: Former Obama White House attorney says ‘it was a mistake’ to deal with Epstein and she regrets it
entry.content: Former Obama White House attorney says ‘it was a mistake’ to deal with Epstein and she regrets it

entry.title: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings
entry.content: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.

entry.title: Why High Credit Card Delinquencies Aren’t Showing Up at the Big Banks
entry.content: Lenders’ results contrast with measures that show the highest credit card delinquency rates in 15 years.

entry.title: How To Make An Iron Condor Take Off With Broadcom Stock
entry.content: How To Make An Iron Condor Take Off With Broadcom Stock

entry.title: Is The Coca-Cola Company (KO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
entry.content: Is The Coca-Cola Company (KO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?

entry.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SpaceX, Apple, PayPal, Cava, Progressive, Micron & more
entry.content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

entry.title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
entry.content: Part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House Financial Services Committee.

entry.title: Wildfires in Ontario make Toronto air quality worst in world
entry.content: Environment Canada has issued health warnings after sky over city turns yellowSmoke from more than 100 active wildfires in northern Ontario have made Toronto’s air quality the current worst in the world and caused yellow, smoky air in cities across the north-east US.Environment Canada issued health warnings on Wednesday after the sky over country’s largest city turned a sickly yellow and was ranked the worst in the world according to IQAir, the Swiss technology company that racks global air quality. Continue reading...

entry.title: Kathryn Ruemmler Tells Congress Her Epstein Emails ‘Taken Out of Context’
entry.content: Goldman Sachs lawyer says she was “friendly” with the convicted sex offender but he was a “masterful liar.”

entry.title: Cancer disparities researchers say federal funding changes have disrupted their work
entry.content: In a survey, 93% of cancer researchers who study disparities said federal policy changes have affected them. Funding is harder to come by and they worry it's slowing progress in their field.

entry.title: The FCC plans to rip up local TV station ownership rules
entry.content: The FCC might be overstepping its bounds to open the door to broadcast TV monopolies.

entry.title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
entry.content: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.

entry.title: Spotify expands parent-managed accounts to users on its free tier
entry.content: The feature was previously only available to paid subscribers.

entry.title: India bets billions on breaking China’s grip on smartphone manufacturing
entry.content: New Delhi announced a $6.5 billion smartphone manufacturing program and a $13.3 billion semiconductor push to deepen India's electronics supply chain.

entry.title: Hinge users can now get friends to hype them up on their profiles
entry.content: You can hear about a prospective match from the people who know them best.

entry.title: Heavy rains keep drenching South Texas, tornado reported in San Antonio
entry.content: Heavy downpours are still drenching South Texas with the possibility of dangerous flash flooding

entry.title: The Latest: Trump says ICE should continue traffic stops despite new policy to halt them
entry.content: President Donald Trump says Immigration and Customs Enforcement should continue traffic stops after two deadly shootings within a week, seeming to contradict a new policy to halt them

entry.title: Report: Detainees at ICE facility in Texas report frequent beatings and other human rights abuses
entry.content: A new report from human rights advocates says 90% of detainees interviewed at a sprawling ICE facility in Texas say they were either beaten by guards or witnessed others being beaten

entry.title: The Latest: Todd Blanche faces US Senate for DOJ confirmation hearing
entry.content: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is confronting questions about his brief but turbulent tenure atop the Justice Department during a Senate confirmation hearing that will test President Donald Trump’s grip on Republican lawmakers whose support the n...

entry.title: New York Fed President Williams says inflation has peaked, rates 'well positioned'
entry.content: Williams cited five reasons why he expects the latest price surge has run its course.

entry.title: Apple Intelligence finally gets regulatory approval in China
entry.content: Apple will reportedly partner with Chinese firms Baidu and Alibaba to roll out its AI service in the country.

entry.title: US charges Russian ‘bulletproof’ web hosts over cyberattacks that netted $62M from cybercrime victims
entry.content: The 2024 indictment, now unsealed, accuses three Russians and two web hosts of aiding hackers and profiting from cybercrime.

entry.title: iOS 27 preview: Long-awaited Siri AI is practical but plain
entry.content: With the iOS 27 public beta available to download, is it worth testing the waters?

entry.title: Jets' desired trade return for Connor Hellebuyck revealed from Sabres
entry.content: Winnipeg is going to want something good in return.

entry.title: ‘Arsenal of democracy’: Jamie Dimon announces $24 million effort to boost American shipbuilding
entry.content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon unveiled a $24 million package to bolster American shipbuilding, funding a new submarine facility at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.

entry.title: Spurs officially move on from young forward in unexpected roster shakeup
entry.content: The Spurs have withdrawn Harrison Ingram's qualifying offer, making the former second-round pick an unrestricted free agent.

entry.title: Russia says foreign troops sent to Ukraine after a peace deal would be legitimate targets
entry.content: Russia says foreign troops sent to Ukraine after a peace deal would be legitimate targets

entry.title: This is why the Sabres want Connor Hellebuyck
entry.content: Buffalo is still involved in the rumors.

entry.title: George Pickens' next contract just became much easier to predict
entry.content: Cowboys WR George Pickens will play the 2026 NFL season on a $27.3M franchise tag after passing the July 15 extension deadline without a deal.

entry.title: What the leaf icon on Google Maps really means (and why it confuses so many users)
entry.content: Eco-friendly routes on Google Maps are worth checking out, but there are a few things to know before you do.

entry.title: Kevin Durant explains why Philadelphia fans 'fear you a little bit'
entry.content: Rockets forward Kevin Durant praises passionate Philadelphia fans and reacts to the Jaylen Brown trade during an MLB All-Star Game interview in Philly.

entry.title: Stars' Jim Nill gets real on hazy state of Jason Robertson contract negotiations
entry.content: The contract negotiations between the Stars and Jason Robertson got a hazy update from GM Jim Nill.

entry.title: Chet Holmgren takes subtle shot at Victor Wembanyama after Spain win
entry.content: Chet Holmgren sparks fresh NBA rivalry drama with a subtle social media jab targeting Victor Wembanyama following Spain's World Cup victory over France.

entry.title: 3 Eagles projected to land among Madden 27's highest-rated rookies
entry.content: The Eagles' first three selections from the 2026 NFL Draft are all expected to rank among Madden 27's 100 top-rated first-year players.

entry.title: France bid adieu to Didier Deschamps and a legacy tied to one question
entry.content: Les Bleus exit at the semi-finals, ending a run of winners, finalists and the final four, but, as Richard Jolly writes, Deschamps might be both the most decorated Frenchman on the global stage and an underachiever

entry.title: Braves ace Chris Sale sends fiery message to No. 1 prospect Cam Caminiti regarding his future
entry.content: Chris Sale has been the ace for the Atlanta Braves since he arrived. He just sent a message to the top prospect that should fire him up during his minor league days.

entry.title: Braves ace Chris Sale sends fiery message to No. 1 prospect Cam Caminiti regarding his future
entry.content: Chris Sale has been the ace for the Atlanta Braves since he arrived. He just sent a message to the top prospect that should fire him up during his minor league days.

entry.title: Declan Rice offers England fitness hope ahead of the Argentina match
entry.content: Declan Rice’s injury has dominated much of England’s build-up to their World Cup semifinal against Argentina, and the midfielder’s fitness remains one of the biggest talking points ahead of toda...

entry.title: “I’d hoped that entry into the Champions League would have been enough” — Gasperini admits sales needed as Man United target Kone

entry.title: India vs England 2nd ODI 2026 lineups as Men in Blue look to seal the series in Cardiff
entry.content: With India already one-up in the three-match series, here's a look at the expected lineups for the second ODI as the Men in Blue look to seal the series.

entry.title: Predictions, Odds, Analysis! UFC Oklahoma City, X-Factor
entry.content: This weekend (Sat., July 18, 2026), Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) will venture forth to the Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma for UFC OKC. Unfortunately, one of the best fights of the card imploded just las week when Kevin Holland withdrew from his scheduled clash with top rising prospect Jacobe Smith. Fortunately, the high-profile main […]

entry.title: Former Obama counsel Kathryn Ruemmler to testify in Epstein probe
entry.content: Goldman Sachs' former top lawyer Kathryn Ruemmler is set to testify as part of the House's investigation into Jeffrey Epstein

entry.title: Spotify is expanding free access to kid-friendly managed accounts
entry.content: Spotify is expanding free access to managed accounts for under-13s.

entry.title: XGIMI Elfin Flip 4K review: An ultra-portable laser projector with sharp video quality
entry.content: XGIMI's Eflin Flip 4K is a portable, stylish projector that provides outstanding image quality at a great price.

entry.content: PPI wholesale inflation falls 0.3% in June thanks to lower gas prices

entry.title: Samsung's new foldable display technology is harder to damage and resists creases
entry.content: Samsung says its next foldables will have less visible creases thanks to its new titanium display tech.

entry.title: Withings' new ultra-premium scale goes on sale today
entry.content: Withings' new $600 bathroom scale promising clinical-grade monitoring is finally available to buy.

entry.title: Google will allow third-party app stores on Android next week
entry.content: Third-party app stores are coming to Android on July 22.
